evals.description: Trigger test: activates on dbt model layering question
evals.prompt: I'm setting up a new dbt project for our e-commerce data. Where should I put staging vs mart models and how should I name them?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on metrics definition question
evals.prompt: We have five dashboards that each calculate revenue differently. How do I create a single source of truth for our revenue metric?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on self-serve analytics question
evals.prompt: Our analysts keep filing tickets asking data engineers what columns mean. How can I make our data warehouse self-serve?

evals.description: Core task: write a staging model with proper rename and cast
evals.prompt: Write a dbt staging model for a raw Stripe payments table that has columns: id, order_id, amount, created, status, currency

evals.description: Core task: define a MetricFlow semantic model with entities, dimensions, and measures
evals.prompt: Define a dbt MetricFlow semantic model for our orders fact table that has order_id, customer_id, order_date, status, and total_amount_cents

evals.description: Core task: build an incremental mart model
evals.prompt: Create a dbt incremental model for fct_orders that joins orders with payments and only processes new rows on each run

evals.description: Core task: write dbt tests for a mart model
evals.prompt: What dbt tests should I add for a fct_orders model with columns order_id, customer_id, and total_amount_cents?
How do I set up dbt source freshness checks so we get alerted when our Stripe data hasn't been loaded in 24 hours?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against putting business logic in staging models
evals.prompt: I want to add a CASE WHEN statement and a JOIN to my staging model to categorize payments. Is that the right place for it?

assertions.value: staging is the right place for business logic

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about averaging averages in metrics
evals.prompt: I defined an average_order_value metric. Now I want to get the average AOV across all regions. Can I just average the per-region AOVs?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about missing grain documentation
evals.prompt: My analyst built a report by joining fct_orders with fct_order_items and the revenue numbers are way too high. What went wrong?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not invent a dbt command that does not exist
evals.prompt: How do I run dbt metrics query from the command line to test my metric definitions?

evals.description: Anti-hallucination: does not recommend SELECT * in staging models
evals.prompt: Should I use SELECT * in my dbt staging models to automatically pick up new columns from the source?

evals.description: References load test: directs to semantic-layer reference for MetricFlow deep dive
evals.prompt: I need to understand all the MetricFlow metric types - simple, derived, ratio, cumulative - with full YAML examples for each. Can you walk me through the complete configuration?
